subject: Two wild horses running together in an open landscape with trees and water in the background
description: Two stocky, compact horses — a larger one in the foreground and a slightly smaller one beside or behind it — run at a gallop across an open landscape. Both are rendered in warm reddish-tan and lighter tan tones. Their build is compact and sturdy, consistent with wild or primitive horse stock, not a domestic riding horse. The background shows a flat or gently sloping landscape with trees at the treeline and a hint of water or sky reflection behind them. The foreground features a decorative checkered or tiled border at the bottom, characteristic of Ice Age era card art styling. The painting style is naturalistic and relatively detailed.
foreground: Two compact wild horses galloping, reddish-tan coloring
background: Open landscape with treeline and distant water
